name: 联网搜索
description: 当用户需要最新信息、新闻、版本内容、价格、外部事实核验、网页证据或公开资料检索时选择此技能。此技能只负责搜索、可选抓取网页正文、返回引用 URL 与本地 artifact 路径，不负责最终总结。
agentInstruction: 你已绑定联网搜索技能，因此本节点需要运行它。根据当前输入判断最合适的搜索 query、max_results、search_depth，以及是否需要 fetch_pages。只为技能准备输入并执行技能；不要在本节点整理、评价或总结搜索结果。技能结果会通过绑定 state 透传给下游节点。

inputSchema.label: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query or question to look up on the public web.

inputSchema.label: Max Results
inputSchema.description: Number of results to return. Defaults to 5 and is capped at 20.

inputSchema.label: Search Depth
inputSchema.description: Tavily depth: basic, advanced, fast, or ultra-fast. Defaults to basic.

inputSchema.label: Include Raw Content
inputSchema.description: When true and Tavily is configured, includes raw extracted content in results.

inputSchema.label: Fetch Pages
inputSchema.description: When true, fetch result pages and store extracted article text as local skill artifacts.

inputSchema.label: Max Pages
inputSchema.description: Number of result pages to fetch when fetch_pages is true. Defaults to 5 and is capped at 10.

inputSchema.label: Max Chars Per Page
inputSchema.description: Maximum extracted characters to store per fetched page. Defaults to 200000 and is capped at 1500000.

outputSchema.label: Provider
outputSchema.description: Search provider used for this request.

outputSchema.label: Query
outputSchema.description: Final query string used for search.

outputSchema.label: Result Count
outputSchema.description: Number of normalized search results returned.

outputSchema.label: Searched At
outputSchema.description: Local timestamp when the search was executed.

outputSchema.label: Searched Date
outputSchema.description: Local date when the search was executed, useful for recency-sensitive answers.

outputSchema.label: Search Brief
outputSchema.description: Provider answer or compact search-result brief. It is evidence context, not the final user-facing summary.

outputSchema.label: Context
outputSchema.description: Cited result blocks formatted for direct agent reasoning.

outputSchema.label: Results
outputSchema.description: Structured search results with title, url, content, score, and optional raw content.

outputSchema.label: Citations
outputSchema.description: Compact citation list with index, title, and URL.

outputSchema.label: Source URLs
outputSchema.description: Flat URL list returned by the search results for downstream state binding.

outputSchema.label: Source Documents
outputSchema.description: Fetched page document references with local artifact paths, URLs, titles, and fetch status.

outputSchema.label: Artifact Paths
outputSchema.description: Flat local artifact path list for fetched readable page documents.

outputSchema.label: Errors
outputSchema.description: Structured error list collected during search or page fetch.

outputSchema.label: Error
outputSchema.description: Error message when status is failed.
